node.content-desc: MOBILE · INDEPENDENT, not connected, HOLD TO SWITCH

node.text: What can Hermes do for you today?
No desktop server reachable, and no model API key configured. Add a key in Settings → AI.

node.content-desc: NEW CHAT, Start a fresh conversation, 00 ↩
PC CONTROLLER, Open apps, close windows, run commands on your desktop.

node.text: Open apps, close windows, run commands on your desktop.

node.content-desc: CODER, Code review, refactoring, debugging, running tests.

node.text: Code review, refactoring, debugging, running tests.

node.content-desc: RESEARCHER, Web search, deep dives, source synthesis.

node.text: Web search, deep dives, source synthesis.
